message:
fix(tests): resolve clippy warnings in tokio_nonfunctional_closure_criteria

- Replace manual char comparison closure with char array pattern
- Replace redundant `if let Some(_)` with `is_some()`
- Replace `map_or(false, ...)` with `is_some_and(...)`

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
